category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU implementation of the stream editor; GNU sed manual introduction defines sed as a stream editor for text transformations.
display_name_sources: GNU sed homepage/manual use GNU sed; source_facts.name is gnu-sed.
docs_sources: Official GNU sed manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/sed/manual and documents version 4.10.
repo_sources: Savannah Git Repositories page for sed gives anonymous clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/sed.git and lists GNU stream editor repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies stream editing; GNU sed manual describes script-based text transformations, regular expressions, and command-line invocation.
